# Korbey Lague PLLP

> Korbey Lague PLLP is a full-service CPA firm based in Tyngsborough, MA, led by two CPA partners — Kelsey Korbey, CPA and Ron Lague, CPA, PFS — and a nine-person team that includes multiple MBA-credentialed staff. The firm serves individuals, small businesses, healthcare practices, contractors, nonprofits, and startups with year-round accounting, tax, bookkeeping, payroll, and virtual CFO services. Their tagline, "Inspired by your success," reflects a relationship-first model built on staying engaged with clients every month — not just at tax time.
